section.title: NAME
section.p: reelect - Re-elect the master node in the replica group.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Re-elect the master node in the replica group.

plentry.pd:
Parameter collection
Seconds Re-election start in how many seconds.

ul.li: Returning timeout error means that the re-election hasn't completed during the time we set. Using db.listReplicaGroups() to view the result.
The re-election can only be started when there is a master node in the replica group.

section.title: Examples
section.p: Conduct the re-election in 60s with the group of 'datagroup1'
